Drow dark elf with midnight-black skin, luminous silver hair, pointed ears, and glowing violet eyes that pierce through shadow.
Dragonborn with emerald-green scales covering body, reptilian snout, prominent curved horns, clawed hands, and ridge-lined spine.
Tiefling with crimson-red skin, long curved ram horns, pointed tail with spade tip, solid golden eyes, and sharp canine teeth.
Minotaur with massive bull head, curved horns, brown fur covering muscular body, hooved feet, and ring piercing through snout.
Sea elf with blue-green skin, webbed fingers, flowing fins along forearms, gills on neck, and pearlescent scale patterns.
Centaur with human torso transitioning to horse body, chestnut coat, four hooves, long flowing tail, and equine ears.
Warforged with segmented metal plates forming body, glowing rune-inscribed chest core, articulated joints, and featureless faceplate with single eye-slit.
Vampire dhampir with porcelain-pale skin, pronounced elongated fangs, blood-red irises, dark veins visible beneath translucent flesh.
Aarakocra bird-folk with feathered head crest, sharp yellow beak, talon-clawed hands and feet, large folded wings on back.
Mountain dwarf with braided rust-red beard, weathered bronze skin, stocky muscular build, and thick calloused hands.
High elf with alabaster skin, elongated pointed ears extending back, luminous amber eyes, silver-threaded hair, and ethereal angular features.
Green orc with jade-tusked underbite, battle-scarred olive skin, pronounced brow ridge, flattened nose, and muscular broad-shouldered frame.
Naga with scaled serpentine lower body replacing legs, human torso, forked tongue, slit-pupil eyes, and cobra hood flaring from neck.
Revenant undead with ashen-grey decaying skin, hollow glowing blue eyes, exposed bone patches on skull, and frost-rimmed skeletal fingers.
Half-dragon with bronze metallic scales on shoulders and forearms, small wing nubs on back, reptilian amber eyes, and fanged jaw.
Satyr with curling goat horns, fur-covered goat legs ending in cloven hooves, human torso, pointed ears, and mischievous slitted pupils.
Crystal-being with translucent gemstone body glowing from within, faceted angular features, prismatic light refractions, and no visible pupils.
Half-orc with greyish-green skin tone, small protruding lower canines, human-like features with broader nose, pronounced jawline, and pointed ear tips.
Dryad with bark-textured skin in brown and green, flowering vines growing from hair, wooden branch fingers, and moss-covered shoulders.
Purple-skinned tiefling with swept-back obsidian horns, vertically-slit silver eyes, prehensile whip-like tail, and sharpened black nails.
Wood elf with sun-tanned copper skin, leaf-shaped pointed ears, moss-green eyes with gold flecks, and vine-like tattoos along arms.
Red orc with crimson-scarred skin, massive jutting tusks from lower jaw, yellow predator eyes, flattened broad nose, and iron-grey topknot.
Blue-skinned tiefling with spiraling gazelle horns, forked black tongue, coal-dark sclera with ice-blue irises, and ridged tail with barbed tip.
Death knight revenant with charcoal-grey corpse skin, frost-blue glowing eye sockets, exposed ribcage with ethereal glow, and blackened armor-fused flesh.
Kobold dragonborn with rust-orange scales, oversized yellow reptilian eyes, short muzzle snout, clawed three-fingered hands, and long whip tail.
Harpy with feathered wings replacing arms, taloned bird feet, human face with sharp features, plumage crown, and piercing raptor eyes.
Moon elf with opalescent silver-white skin, long tapered ears with starlight glow, pure white pupilless eyes, and luminescent freckle constellations.
Goliath with stone-grey mottled skin, dark geometric tattoos, protruding bone ridges on forehead and shoulders, seven-foot towering muscular frame.
Living stone golem-woman with granite-textured slate skin, glowing amber crystal eyes, carved runic patterns across body, and boulder-jointed limbs.
Shadow elf with dusky purple-grey skin, solid black eyes without whites, smoke-like wisps trailing from hair, and darkness-wreathed pointed ears.
Fomorian giant with grotesque asymmetrical features, bulging mismatched eyes, mottled grey-green skin, hunched twisted spine, and gnarled oversized limbs.
Triton with aquamarine scaled skin, finned crests along head and spine, webbed hands with claws, gill slits on ribs, and bioluminescent markings.
Sunfire elf with golden-bronze radiant skin, flame-orange eyes without pupils, pointed ears with glowing tips, and sunburst tattoos emanating heat shimmer.
Troll with mottled swamp-green rubbery skin, regenerating tissue showing raw pink patches, hunched posture, elongated arms with clawed fingers, prominent underbite.
Lamia with serpentine scaled lower body in diamond patterns, human torso with reptilian features, fanged smile, forked tongue, and hooded cobra-like neck frill.
Duergar grey dwarf with ash-pale skin, completely bald head, dead-white pupilless eyes, prominent brow ridge, and soot-stained muscular build.
Succubus fiend with wine-red skin, curved backward-sweeping horns, leathery bat wings, barbed tail, glowing crimson eyes, and seductive sharp features.
Ent-kin treant with gnarled oak-bark skin, branch antlers growing from head, wooden knothole eyes, moss-covered joints, and root-like feet.
Cyclops with single massive eye centered in forehead, thick brutish brow, sun-weathered tan skin, broken tusk teeth, and towering muscular frame.
Awakened fungus-folk with mushroom cap growing from head, spore-releasing gills on neck, mottled tan-cream skin with mycelia veins, and mossy texture.
Heroic Polynesian human with intricate black tribal tattoos covering bronze skin, flower lei adornments, powerful athletic build, and determined dark eyes.
Banshee wraith-touched with translucent ghostly-pale skin, flowing ethereal white hair defying gravity, hollow black eye sockets, and spectral mist trailing from fingertips.
Drake-bred half-dragon with iridescent copper scales forming armor patches on chest and thighs, clawed feet, slitted amber eyes, and smoke wisping from nostrils.
Faun with deer antlers branching from temples, dappled fawn-spotted skin on human torso, digitigrade goat legs with white fur, and large innocent eyes.
Imp-kin tiefling with burnt-orange leathery skin, small bat wings protruding from shoulder blades, pointed devil ears, needle-sharp teeth, and whip-thin barbed tail.
Forest gnome with acorn-brown weathered skin, bulbous nose, oversized pointed ears, wild flower-tangled hair, and nimble three-foot-tall stature.
Wyvern-kin with jade-scaled wings folded against back, ridged spine crest, elongated neck, raptor-clawed hands, and venomous barbed tail stinger.
Lich necromancer with desiccated parchment-thin skin clinging to skull, empty eye sockets blazing green flame, exposed yellowed teeth, and bone-thin skeletal hands crackling with dark magic.
Samurai-world human with topknot hairstyle, honorable scarred tan skin, katana calluses on palms, intense almond-shaped eyes, and disciplined warrior posture.
Starfolk celestial with midnight-blue skin dotted with glowing constellation freckles, silver-white luminous hair, eyes like swirling galaxies, and radiant aura shimmer.
